title: ji AFK Cinematic
description: AFK Cinematics in 4K with immersive camera system
body:
![portada](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a67a56c9956340770155e78c1906bc9e6efa3cf3.png)

## Turn every idle second into a Hollywood-worthy Minecraft masterpiece No more lifeless staring at a wall. The moment you go AFK, Ji AFK Cinematic instantly transforms your screen into a breathtaking cinematic experience — smooth, dramatic camera work that makes your character, your builds, and your world feel like the star of a AAA movie trailer. Whether you’re chilling in your epic base, soaring with Elytra, or riding a minecart through the night, your AFK time now feels alive, cinematic, and genuinely relaxing.
----

## ✨ **Live the Experience** - **10 cinematic shots** — sweeping crane shots, dramatic orbits, low gliding dolly cams, and epic panorama sweeps that make your world look legendary - **Butter-smooth tracking** — follows you perfectly even while flying, boating, falling, or riding — zero lag, zero jank - **Smart safety net** — instantly wakes you up the second you take damage (or pauses the game if you want) - **Pure immersion** — optional 21:9 letterbox bars + nostalgic C418 music that turns your break into a vibe - **Instant return** — move your mouse or press any key and you’re back in full control instantly
---

## Immersive AFK cinematic system with smooth camera paths

----

## ⚙️ **Made for You** Fully customizable in-game menu (Mod Menu support): • AFK timer (seconds until magic starts) • Shot length & camera speed • Nametag visibility • Damage protection style **Languages:** English + Español (LatAm & Spain)
----

## 📦 **Requirements & Supported Versions** **Supported Minecraft Versions:** `1.21.x` - `26.1` - `26.2` | Loader / Dependency | Version required | Status | |---------------------|------------------|-----------------| | **Fabric Loader** | Matches your MC | 🔴 **Required** | | **Fabric API** | Latest available | 🔴 **Required** | | **Mod Menu** | Latest available | 🟢 *Recommended* (For in-game settings) | **🎮 100% Client-Side** — Works on any server (Vanilla, Paper, Realms, etc.), no server-side installation needed!
